name: geocode_search
description: Convert an address, place name, or point of interest into geographic coordinates (forward geocoding). Powered by the Pelias geocoder using OpenStreetMap, Who's on First, and GeoNames data. Returns multiple candidate results ranked by relevance, each with coordinates and structured address components.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The address or place name to geocode. Examples: '1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, Washington DC', 'Eiffel Tower', 'Berlin Hauptbahnhof'.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 10, maximum is 40.

parameters.name: boundary.country
parameters.description: Restrict results to a specific country using ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code. Example: 'DEU' for Germany, 'USA' for United States.

parameters.name: focus.point.lon
parameters.description: Longitude to bias results toward. Used together with focus.point.lat.

parameters.name: focus.point.lat
parameters.description: Latitude to bias results toward. Used together with focus.point.lon.

parameters.name: layers
parameters.description: Comma-separated filter for result types. Options: venue, address, street, neighbourhood, borough, localadmin, locality, county, macrocounty, region, macroregion, country.
